channel.title: Daily AI News Digest
channel.description: Daily AI industry news, summarized and narrated.

item.title: AI Digest — July 2, 2026
item.description: Today's top AI stories: a new OpenAI model, Anthropic's safety report, DeepMind robotics research, and more.

item.title: AI Digest — July 01, 2026
item.description: Today's top AI stories: Meta planning cloud business to sell AI computing power: Sources, US lifts export controls on Anthropic AI models, boosting market prospects, White House accelerates plans for AI model standards with new executive order, and more.

item.title: AI Digest — June 30, 2026
item.description: Today's top AI stories: White House lifts export control on Anthropic that froze its most advanced models | CNN Business, The Trump Administration Is Lifting Its Export Controls on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable AI Models, Anthropic to restoring access to Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 from tomorrow, and more.
